text:
cury-Moon combination
Jupt.
will make the native a crook, a dacoit,
Mer.
given to sex relations with other Mars
Moon
women. Sat.
As Saturn is with exalted Mercury and the Moon, the native will travel
widely and earn by trade. He will have the trait of eloping with women by
deceit.
Venus in Cancer indicates loss of one wife whom he would marry
between 25-26th years.
He will be intelligent with devotion to God. He will marry a second
time.
From 30th year he will have good times.
When Jupiter transits Scorpio in his 3rd round, he will have to face
danger.
CHART466
Here Jupiter and Saturn are
Moon placed in Virgo. There is the Moon in
Pisces aspecting both. He will face
trouble from the time of his birth. He
will be very learned and acquaint
himself with Vedic texts. He will en
Yen.
ter service from 25th year. He will
have a good character and obtain good
Sun Jupt, degrees in his educational career. He
Mars
Mer. Sat. will have 2 sisters.

BHRIGU NANDI NADI
